title: verbascum ovalifolium
intro: Verbascum ovalifolium, also known as Oval-leaved Mullein, is a biennial plant species that belongs to the figwort family. Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of Verbascum ovalifolium have been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been used to treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Verbascum ovalifolium can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health benefits.
